message:
fix: resolve launch sequence phasing, failure handling, and reinitialization bugs (#5506, #5507, #5508) (#5515)

- #5506: Phased mode now waits for each phase to reach a terminal state
  before starting the next phase, using a waitForPhaseCompletion gate.
  Previously all phases were launched back-to-back despite the "phased"
  deploy mode.

- #5507: The catch path in launchProject now recomputes phase-level
  status via derivePhaseStatus(), so a failure before startMission()
  no longer leaves the phase stuck in "running" forever.

- #5508: Initialization and auto-start effects now depend on a
  content-based phase signature (phase number + name + project names)
  instead of just phase count, so editing phase membership without
  changing the number of phases correctly reinitializes launch state.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
